name: Oriental Goose Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 3 large Celery stalks, cut into 1-inch pieces
2 Bell peppers, 1 red and 1 green, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the goose breasts and pat dry. Cut them into 1-inch slices and par-boil for 20 minutes. Drain and reserve the broth.
2. Sauté the goose, onions, mushrooms, and almonds in a skillet for 15 minutes. Salt and pepper to taste, and add seasoned salt if desired.
3. Prepare the Rice-A-Roni according to package directions, using the reserved broth and adding celery and pepper slices halfway through cooking time.
4. Combine the goose mixture with the rice mixture and simmer for 15 minutes before serving.
